# Undreamt

### Building what has never been dreamt.

Open-source community focused on creating tools, systems, infrastructure, and ideas for developers, researchers, creators, and businesses.

</div>

---


## About

This repository contains the source code for the official website and public platform for the Undreamt open-source ecosystem.
.

The current website acts as the initial public platform for the Undreamt ecosystem while the broader infrastructure, projects, and platforms are under active development.

---

# Tech Stack

- Nuxt 4
- Vue 3
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- PrimeVue
- Vite

---

# Development

Install dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

Start development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

The application will be available at:

```text
http://localhost:3000
```

---

# Build

Create production build:

```bash
npm run build
```

Preview production build:

```bash
npm run preview
```

---

# Structure

```text
app/
├── assets/
├── pages/
├── app.vue
│
public/
│
nuxt.config.ts
package.json
```

---

# Status

The website is currently in an early development phase and will continue evolving alongside the Undreamt ecosystem.

---

- [Undreamt Organization](https://github.com/undreamt-hq)

- [Orbit](https://github.com/orbit-projects)
